steps.t: The cache of bandages he says is hidden east of Lhanuch. The rune-marker should be carved on a solitary tree somewhere directly east of the Lhanuch. C…
The cache of bandages is buried in a small copse of trees directly north-east of the rune. Culang asked you to retrieve a hidden cache of bandages.
Culang is at his camp in Nan Laeglin, to the south of the cache. You have discovered the Rangers' cache and dug up the bandages hidden there. Now you …
